blocks.description: Header comments, OPTIONS for macro tracing and variable naming, and LIBNAME statements for raw data (read-only), staging workspace, master reference tables (read-only), and target output library.

DATA step for comprehensive field validation: checks missing required fields, numeric range violations (age, income, credit_score), email/phone regex validation via PRXMATCH, future date detection, and routes valid/invalid records to separate output datasets.

DATA step using ARRAY to standardize character fields (UPCASE/STRIP) and perform min-max normalization on numeric scores (credit_score, annual_income, account_balance) to 0-1 scale with predefined boundary arrays.
PROC FREQ for data profiling: generates missing value frequency report for key fields (age, credit_score, annual_income, email, phone, state).
PROC UNIVARIATE for outlier detection: computes percentile-based statistics (1st through 99th) for income, credit score, account balance, and age, outputting boundary values to staging.outlier_stats.

DATA step to impute missing values: median substitution for age, credit_score regression estimate for income, zip code prefix lookup for state, with imputation flag variables tracking which fields were filled.

PROC SQL for referential integrity checks: identifies orphan customer records not in master.customer_master via LEFT JOIN, detects invalid state codes against master.state_reference, and produces a UNION ALL summary count of integrity issues.
PROC CONTENTS to generate metadata report for the cleaned output dataset tgt.customer_cleaned, saving column-level metadata to staging.metadata_report.
